subject: Dashboard v2 — product update + comparison mode

messages.subject: Dashboard v2 — product update + comparison mode
messages.body_text:
Priya, Marcus,

Quick product update ahead of Sprint 11 planning:

- Core layout: Raj and I approved the 12-screen Figma set last week. Moving forward.
- Saved views: Sofia is scoping. Two-sprint estimate.
- Comparison mode (VEC-82): Marcus and I are aligned — comparison mode IS in scope for v2 launch. Backend changes needed but we're committing to it. Three customers have asked: Brainloop, Cascade, and one prospect. I am not shipping v2 without this feature.

Full brief is in Drive: product/dashboard-v2-product-brief.md

— Dana Reeves
Head of Product, Vectrix Labs
dana@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Dashboard v2 — product update + comparison mode
messages.body_text:
Dana,

Hey — I only saw this because Marcus mentioned it to me. Why wasn't I CC'd?

I'm in active conversations with Maria Chen at Cascade specifically about comparison mode. She asked about it during onboarding and I told her it was coming in v2. I also have it in my notes from Jason Liu at Ridgeway — he listed it as a deal requirement.

If we're making v2 scope decisions I need to be in the loop. Can you add me going forward?

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Dashboard v2 — product update + comparison mode [Tessa added]
messages.body_text:
Tessa — you're right, I'm sorry. Should have had you on this from the start.

Looping you in now. Comparison mode (VEC-82) is confirmed for v2 scope as of yesterday's alignment with Marcus. Priya is on board. I'll make sure you're in all v2 decisions going forward.

— Dana Reeves
Head of Product, Vectrix Labs
dana@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Dashboard v2 — product update + comparison mode [Tessa added]
messages.body_text:
Thanks for adding me. Good to know comparison mode is locked for v2 — I'll confirm that with Maria Chen this week.

One note from my Cascade conversations: Maria's specific ask is week-over-week comparison, not just custom date ranges. Worth making sure Raj and Sofia have that context from my Slack thread with Marcus last week.

— Tessa Moreno
Head of Sales, Vectrix Labs
tessa@vectrix.io
